title: viola urophylla
intro: Viola urophylla, also known as Chinese pimpernel, is a species of flowering plant in the violet family (Violaceae). It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to promote blood circulation, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Viola urophylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Herbal preparations of Viola urophylla include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
